brand.name: Veronica Wilen, Realtor
brand.brokerage: Christie's International Real Estate First Coast

captions.facebook:
Nocatee's June numbers are in, and if you own here they're worth a look.

The median sale price held steady while homes spent a little longer on the market than they did this spring. In plain terms: buyers have a bit more room to breathe, and well-priced homes are still moving.

Curious what your Nocatee home would list for in today's market? Send me a DM and I'll run the numbers for you.

Veronica Wilen, Realtor · Christie's International Real Estate First Coast

Wondering what that means for YOUR home? DM me and I'll break it down.

posts.hook: What it's actually like to live in Nocatee

media.label: Needs a photo (Splash Water Park or greenway)

captions.facebook:
People ask me all the time what it's really like to live in Nocatee. Here's the short version.

Golf carts to dinner. Miles of greenway trails. A water park the whole neighborhood treats like a backyard. And a farmers market that turns Saturday mornings into a community event.

It feels less like a subdivision and more like a small town that happens to be brand new.

Thinking about a move to the area? I've lived here since 2016, so ask me anything. 👇
captions.instagram:
Living in Nocatee, in one post 🌴

🚗 Golf carts everywhere
🌳 Miles of greenway trails
💦 Splash & Spray water parks
🥕 Saturday farmers market

I've called Nocatee home since 2016. Questions about the area? Drop them below.

posts.needs: Drop the new listing in the 'Steven – Social Media Listings' Drive folder: photos plus a short note (address, price, beds/baths, sqft, status, highlights). The system builds the reel and captions automatically.

posts.hook: What's being built in St. Johns County right now

media.label: Needs a photo (new construction or map graphic)

captions.facebook:
St. Johns County keeps growing, and if you're buying or selling here the new development matters.

A few things on my radar right now: continued build-out around Nocatee's Town Center, new retail along CR-210, and road improvements meant to ease the commute north.

More rooftops and amenities tend to support home values over time, though the details vary block by block. Wondering how it affects your street specifically? Let's talk.
captions.instagram:
St. Johns County is still booming 🏗️

On my radar: Nocatee Town Center growth, new retail on CR-210, and road upgrades to ease the drive north.

What it means for your home value depends on your exact neighborhood. Questions? DM me.

posts.hook: Things to do on the First Coast this weekend

media.label: Needs a photo (local event or St. Augustine)

captions.facebook:
Looking for something to do this weekend on the First Coast? A few local favorites:

🎣 Morning at the beach before the crowds
🍤 Dinner in St. Augustine's historic district
🎶 Live music around Nocatee Town Center

One of my favorite parts of this area is that there's always something going on. What's your go-to weekend spot?
